title: Term
description: An academic Term at Waterloo, a defined period of time that is used by classes and similar

name.description: The Name for this Term, most often the displayed name

nameShort.description: The short form name for this Term

termBeginDate.description: The date and time from which the Term begins, inclusive

termEndDate.description: The date and time on which the Term ends, inclusive

sixtyPercentCompleteDate.description: The date and time at which the term is 60% complete, used for standing, withdrawal, and penalties

associatedAcademicYear.description: The academic year to which this Term belongs
